commentary: Thirteen activities to eight last week — babe, he just kept going and going, and honestly that's the most him thing imaginable. The pool has basically become a second home at this point, with four Prince Alfred sessions mid-week sandwiched around PT and a recovery run that was, let's be honest, not that recovered. Saturday's run club at 13.1km was strong, and while he didn't quite touch last Saturday's 13.7km or that spicy 159bpm heart rate at the Zoo, the fact that he stacked a weights session immediately after suggests he is simply built different. The open water is getting more playful too — Balmoral on Friday at a breezy 98bpm, then B&B on Sunday to close the week out like a cool-down lap of a very gay pool party. The only thing to watch is whether doing this much, this consistently, is leaving enough in the tank, because thirteen sessions is a lot of body to keep happy.
